operating_lanes.why_cn: 这条线决定贷款产品能不能稳定放款、正确入账、解释费用，并在监管/消费者保护语境下保持可复核。
operating_lanes.why_en: This lane determines whether the lending product can disburse reliably, post repayments correctly, explain fees, and remain reviewable under regulatory and consumer-protection expectations.
operating_lanes.next_action_cn: 固定追踪 BoZ 支付系统、CCPC 消费者保护、DPC 数据保护；每条信号都映射到产品页面、支付异常、客服话术或复核清单。
operating_lanes.next_action_en: Keep watching BoZ payment systems, CCPC consumer protection, and DPC data protection; map each signal to product screens, payment exceptions, support scripts, or review checklists.

operating_lanes.why_cn: 竞品变化最有价值的部分不是“谁存在”，而是额度、期限、费用表达、速度承诺、支付方式、客服/隐私入口如何组合成产品打法。
operating_lanes.why_en: The useful part of competitor monitoring is not who exists, but how limits, tenor, pricing language, speed promises, payment methods, support, and privacy routes form product strategy.
operating_lanes.next_action_cn: 把已复核竞品信号继续结构化成额度档、期限、速度、支付成熟度、客服/隐私成熟度和公开信息缺口。
operating_lanes.next_action_en: Keep structuring reviewed competitor signals into limit tier, tenor, speed, payment maturity, support/privacy maturity, and evidence gaps.

operating_lanes.why_cn: 这条线更接近真实用户摩擦：不到账、扣费不清、客服解释不足、欺诈、账号或钱包问题，都会直接影响坏账、投诉和口碑。
operating_lanes.why_en: This lane is closest to real user friction: delayed payout, unclear charges, weak support explanations, fraud, account, or wallet issues directly affect credit loss, complaints, and reputation.
operating_lanes.next_action_cn: 增加公开 app listing/review、公开新闻和公开投诉关键词 watchlist；只抓公开页面，不碰登录、私域群组或借款人数据。
operating_lanes.next_action_en: Add public app listing/review, public news, and public complaint-keyword watchlists; use only public pages, not logged-in spaces, private groups, or borrower data.

operating_lanes.why_cn: 催收风险通常不会先以政策文件出现，而会从投诉、隐私边界、联系人使用、逾期解释和客服升级里显形。
operating_lanes.why_en: Collections risk often appears first through complaints, privacy boundaries, contact-person usage, overdue explanations, and support escalation rather than formal policy documents.
operating_lanes.next_action_cn: 在投诉/评论来源中强化 overdue、late payment、collection、harassment、contact、privacy 等关键词，并把结果映射到催收话术和升级边界。
operating_lanes.next_action_en: Strengthen overdue, late payment, collection, harassment, contact, and privacy keywords in complaint/review sources, then map results to collections scripts and escalation boundaries.

operating_lanes.lane_cn: 周报解读与部署数据层
operating_lanes.lane_en: Brief Interpretation and Deployment Data Layer
operating_lanes.why_cn: 平台的价值不在抓取次数，而在每周能不能产出一份可读、可复核、能指导学习重点的个人研究笔记。
operating_lanes.why_en: The platform's value is not crawl volume. It is whether each week produces a readable, source-linked note that guides learning priorities.
operating_lanes.next_action_cn: 云端展示用 GitHub snapshot 和生成的 Markdown/CSV，本地继续保留 SQLite 作为研究库；节点版本同步后让 Streamlit 自动刷新。
operating_lanes.next_action_en: Use GitHub snapshots and generated Markdown/CSV for cloud display while keeping SQLite as the local research store; milestone sync should trigger Streamlit refresh.

interpretive_findings.finding_cn: 支付轨道已经是小微贷款运营风险的核心变量，不只是银行后台问题。
interpretive_findings.finding_en: Payment rails are a core micro-lending operating-risk variable, not just a bank back-office issue.
interpretive_findings.why_cn: BoZ/ZIPSS/Montran/NFS 信号会影响放款到账、还款入账、失败交易、对账、客服解释和合作方管理。
interpretive_findings.why_en: BoZ/ZIPSS/Montran/NFS signals affect payout, repayment posting, failed transactions, reconciliation, support explanations, and partner management.

interpretive_findings.finding_cn: 费用与披露是监管/投诉/声誉风险交汇点。
interpretive_findings.finding_en: Fees and disclosure are where regulatory, complaint, and reputation risk meet.
interpretive_findings.why_cn: CCPC 与 BoZ 相关信号都指向清晰、充分、不可误导的信息披露，贷款产品需要把总成本、费用名称和扣款时点讲清楚。
interpretive_findings.why_en: CCPC and BoZ signals point to clear, sufficient, non-misleading disclosure. Lending products need clear total cost, fee labels, and deduction timing.

interpretive_findings.finding_cn: 投诉处理应被当成运营数据系统，而不是单纯客服事项。
interpretive_findings.finding_en: Complaint handling should be treated as an operating data system, not just a support task.
interpretive_findings.why_cn: 支付失败、费用争议、隐私请求和催收争议需要统一分类、证据留存、SLA 和升级路径。
interpretive_findings.why_en: Failed payments, fee disputes, privacy requests, and collections disputes need common taxonomy, evidence retention, SLA, and escalation paths.

interpretive_findings.finding_cn: 数据保护会影响 app 权限、风控建模和催收触达。
interpretive_findings.finding_en: Data protection affects app permissions, risk modeling, and collections contact.
interpretive_findings.why_cn: 数字贷款依赖个人数据和第三方处理，隐私信号需要转化为数据清单、授权说明、供应商边界和客户权利流程。
interpretive_findings.why_en: Digital lending depends on personal data and third-party processing. Privacy signals must become data inventory, consent language, vendor boundaries, and rights-handling workflows.

interpretive_findings.finding_cn: 竞品线已经从空白进入 phase-1 产品矩阵阶段。
interpretive_findings.finding_en: The competitor lane has moved from blank coverage into a phase-1 product-matrix stage.
interpretive_findings.why_cn: 已复核信号开始覆盖 FLoan、Lupiya、PremierCredit、PowerKwacha 的额度、期限、速度承诺、客群、支付路径、客服和隐私入口。下一步不是多抓，而是把这些字段结构化比较。
interpretive_findings.why_en: Reviewed signals now cover limits, tenor, speed promises, segments, payment paths, support, and privacy entry points across FLoan, Lupiya, PremierCredit, and PowerKwacha. The next step is structured comparison, not just more crawling.

impact_matrix_top.signal: Support for mobile payments and installment-based repayment, with clear schedules and terms.
impact_matrix_top.lending_impact_cn: 首轮竞品官网/FAQ 监控已经能看到额度、期限、速度承诺、客群分层、支付路径、客服入口和隐私入口。对小微贷款业务最有用的是把这些信号整理成产品矩阵，而不是只保存网页标题。
impact_matrix_top.lending_impact_en: The phase-1 competitor website/FAQ watch now shows limits, tenor, speed promises, customer segmentation, payment paths, support channels, and privacy entry points. The useful lending impact is a product matrix, not saved page titles.
impact_matrix_top.affected_processes_cn: 竞品 watchlist、Google Play/app listing、官网 FAQ、费用页、申请资格页、公开用户评价。
impact_matrix_top.affected_processes_en: Competitor watchlist, Google Play/app listings, FAQ, fee pages, eligibility pages, public user reviews.
impact_matrix_top.recommended_actions_cn: 维护竞品矩阵：机构、客群、产品、额度、期限、速度承诺、放款/还款通道、客服入口、隐私/账户控制入口。Google Play/public reviews 仍需单独批准后再启用。
impact_matrix_top.recommended_actions_en: Maintain a competitor matrix: institution, segment, product, limit, tenor, speed promise, payout/repayment channel, support route, privacy/account-control route. Enable Google Play/public reviews only after separate approval.
impact_matrix_top.follow_up_questions_cn: 哪些竞品信号会改变产品定位：额度更高、期限更长、审批更快、支付轨道更强、客群更细、隐私/客服入口更清楚？
impact_matrix_top.follow_up_questions_en: Which competitor signals change positioning: higher limits, longer tenor, faster approval, stronger payment rails, finer segmentation, clearer privacy/support routes?

impact_matrix_top.lending_impact_cn: 对贷款业务的影响集中在定价页面、借款确认页、逾期/罚息说明、客服解释和投诉风险。费用越复杂，越需要在客户旅程里提前解释。
impact_matrix_top.lending_impact_en: The lending impact sits in pricing pages, loan confirmation screens, late-fee/penalty explanations, support explanations, and complaint risk. The more complex the fee stack, the earlier it must be explained in the customer journey.
impact_matrix_top.affected_processes_cn: 产品定价、费用披露、借款合同摘要、营销文案、FAQ、客服话术、投诉复核。
impact_matrix_top.affected_processes_en: Product pricing, fee disclosure, loan-summary pages, marketing copy, FAQ, support scripts, complaint review.
impact_matrix_top.recommended_actions_cn: 把所有客户可能支付的金额拆成“本金、利息、服务费、罚费、第三方费用、支付轨道费用”，逐项检查是否在申请前、确认前和还款前可见。
impact_matrix_top.recommended_actions_en: Break every customer payable amount into principal, interest, service fee, penalty fee, third-party fee, and rail fee; check visibility before application, confirmation, and repayment.
impact_matrix_top.follow_up_questions_cn: 客户在点击确认前能否知道总成本？费用名称是否和实际扣款一致？支付轨道费用是否被误认为贷款费用？
impact_matrix_top.follow_up_questions_en: Can the customer see total cost before confirmation? Do fee labels match actual deductions? Could rail fees be mistaken for lender fees?

impact_matrix_top.source: Bank of Zambia Customer Complaints Handling and Resolution Directives
impact_matrix_top.signal: BoZ Customer Complaints Handling and Resolution Directives (metadata-only PDF; manual read/OCR needed)
impact_matrix_top.lending_impact_cn: 对小微贷款的影响不是“有没有投诉入口”这么简单，而是投诉数据、处理时限、证据留存、跨团队升级和重复问题复盘能力。
impact_matrix_top.lending_impact_en: The micro-lending impact is not just whether a complaint channel exists. It is complaint data, resolution timelines, evidence retention, cross-team escalation, and repeat-issue review.
impact_matrix_top.affected_processes_cn: 客服工单、投诉分类、SLA、支付失败争议、费用争议、催收争议、数据/隐私请求、监管问询准备。
impact_matrix_top.affected_processes_en: Support tickets, complaint taxonomy, SLA, payment-failure disputes, fee disputes, collections disputes, data/privacy requests, regulator-query readiness.
impact_matrix_top.recommended_actions_cn: 建立 lending ops 投诉分类树：放款、还款、费用、欺诈、隐私、催收、客服态度、技术故障；每类都要有证据、负责人和关闭标准。
impact_matrix_top.recommended_actions_en: Build a lending-ops complaint taxonomy: disbursement, repayment, fees, fraud, privacy, collections, support conduct, technical failure; each needs evidence, owner, and closure criteria.
impact_matrix_top.follow_up_questions_cn: 哪些投诉会升级为监管风险？哪些投诉代表产品设计问题而不是单个客服问题？AI/自动化处理是否会造成解释不足？
impact_matrix_top.follow_up_questions_en: Which complaints could become regulatory risk? Which complaints indicate product design issues rather than agent errors? Could AI/automation under-explain decisions?

impact_matrix_top.lending_impact_cn: 数字贷款高度依赖身份、设备、联系人、交易和还款数据。隐私信号会影响 app 权限、信用评估、风控模型、催收联系、第三方供应商和跨境处理。
impact_matrix_top.lending_impact_en: Digital lending depends on identity, device, contact, transaction, and repayment data. Privacy signals affect app permissions, credit assessment, risk models, collections contact, vendors, and cross-border processing.
impact_matrix_top.affected_processes_cn: 注册/KYC、app 权限、信用评分、反欺诈、数据保留、第三方处理、催收触达、数据主体请求。
impact_matrix_top.affected_processes_en: Registration/KYC, app permissions, credit scoring, anti-fraud, retention, third-party processing, collections contact, data-subject requests.
impact_matrix_top.recommended_actions_cn: 为每类数据写出“收集目的、使用场景、保存期限、共享对象、客户权利入口”；尤其关注联系人/设备/位置/交易数据。
impact_matrix_top.recommended_actions_en: For each data category, document purpose, use case, retention, sharing party, and customer-rights channel; pay special attention to contacts, device, location, and transaction data.
impact_matrix_top.follow_up_questions_cn: 哪些数据是放款必需，哪些只是优化模型？客户撤回授权后贷款和催收流程如何处理？供应商是否构成 processor/controller 风险？
impact_matrix_top.follow_up_questions_en: Which data is necessary for lending, and which only optimizes the model? What happens if consent is withdrawn? Do vendors create processor/controller risk?

impact_matrix_top.lending_impact_cn: 对小微贷款最直接的影响是放款到账、还款入账、失败交易处理、对账和合作方依赖。它不一定改变贷款产品本身，但会改变运营可用性、异常处理和客户体验。
impact_matrix_top.lending_impact_en: The direct micro-lending impact is disbursement reliability, repayment posting, failed-transaction handling, reconciliation, and partner dependency. It may not change the loan product, but it changes operating availability and customer experience.
impact_matrix_top.affected_processes_cn: 放款、还款、对账、失败交易、退款/冲正、合作银行/钱包/聚合器管理、周末和延长营业时间支持。
impact_matrix_top.affected_processes_en: Disbursement, repayment, reconciliation, failed transactions, reversals/refunds, partner bank/wallet/aggregator management, weekend and extended-hours support.
impact_matrix_top.recommended_actions_cn: 建立支付轨道清单：哪些贷款流程依赖银行、钱包、NFS、ZIPSS、聚合器；为失败交易、延迟入账和重复扣款写清楚客服口径和升级路径。
impact_matrix_top.recommended_actions_en: Build a payment-rail dependency map: which loan flows depend on banks, wallets, NFS, ZIPSS, or aggregators; define support scripts and escalation paths for failed, delayed, or duplicate transactions.
impact_matrix_top.follow_up_questions_cn: 如果某条轨道延迟或不可用，借款人会看到什么？还款逾期计算是否会误伤客户？客服如何证明是轨道问题而非客户问题？
impact_matrix_top.follow_up_questions_en: If a rail is delayed or unavailable, what does the borrower see? Could repayment-late logic harm customers? How can support distinguish rail failure from customer error?

coverage_gaps.gap_cn: 已有 BoZ、CCPC、DPC，但仍偏政策文件，需要转成业务流程影响。
coverage_gaps.gap_en: BoZ, CCPC, and DPC exist, but many signals are policy documents and need process-level interpretation.
coverage_gaps.next_source_cn: 继续 BoZ JSON:API、CCPC、DPC；补 BoZ publications/annual reports 的稳定文件路径。
coverage_gaps.next_source_en: Continue BoZ JSON:API, CCPC, DPC; add stable BoZ publications/annual-report file routes.

coverage_gaps.gap_cn: phase-1 官网/FAQ watchlist 已建立并完成首轮复核，但 Google Play/app listing 和公开评论层仍未默认启用。
coverage_gaps.gap_en: The phase-1 website/FAQ watchlist exists and has first-pass review, but Google Play/app listings and public-review sources remain disabled by default.
coverage_gaps.next_source_cn: 把已复核官网信号整理成竞品矩阵；再决定是否启用 Google Play/public app listing，用于观察 app 权限、评分、公开评论主题。
coverage_gaps.next_source_en: Turn reviewed website signals into a competitor matrix; then decide whether to enable Google Play/public app listings for app permissions, ratings, and public-review themes.

coverage_gaps.gap_cn: 已有 ZICTA/CCPC/BoZ complaint 信号，但缺少真实公开用户评论和投诉主题趋势。
coverage_gaps.gap_en: ZICTA/CCPC/BoZ complaint signals exist, but real public user-review and complaint-theme trend sources are missing.
coverage_gaps.next_source_cn: 运行 ZICTA DFS 两个源；补公开 app review、公开新闻和公开社媒页面的低频监控。
coverage_gaps.next_source_en: Run both ZICTA DFS sources; add low-frequency public app review, public news, and public social-page monitoring.

coverage_gaps.gap_cn: 目前多为官方叙事，不能代表借款人声音或品牌舆情。
coverage_gaps.gap_en: Current signals are mostly official narratives and do not represent borrower voice or brand sentiment.
coverage_gaps.next_source_cn: 增加公开新闻搜索结果、公开 app reviews、公开 Facebook/LinkedIn 页面，仅限无需登录内容。
coverage_gaps.next_source_en: Add public news results, public app reviews, and public Facebook/LinkedIn pages, only where no login is required.

coverage_gaps.gap_cn: 缺少直接催收行为信号；只能从投诉、隐私、消费者保护间接推断。
coverage_gaps.gap_en: Direct collections-conduct signals are missing; current view is inferred from complaints, privacy, and consumer protection.
coverage_gaps.next_source_cn: 在公开评论/投诉里增加 harassment、overdue、late payment、collections、contact 等关键词。
coverage_gaps.next_source_en: Add harassment, overdue, late payment, collections, contact keywords to public review/complaint monitoring.

coverage_gaps.gap_cn: 支付轨道和网络/供应商信号不错，但还缺少将变更映射到内部流程的自动视图。
coverage_gaps.gap_en: Payment-rail and network/vendor signals are useful, but need automatic mapping into internal process impact.
coverage_gaps.next_source_cn: 把 BoZ ZIPSS/NFS/Montran 信号固定映射到放款、还款、对账、客服排班、异常处理。
coverage_gaps.next_source_en: Map BoZ ZIPSS/NFS/Montran signals into disbursement, repayment, reconciliation, support staffing, and exception handling.

market_voice.business_read_cn: 投诉不是客服孤岛，而是放款、还款、费用、隐私、欺诈、催收和产品解释的综合反馈系统。

market_voice.action_en: Document purpose, use case, retention, sharing party, and rights channel for each data type, especially contacts, device, location, and transaction data.

policy_impact_rows.source_anchor_cn: CCPC 消费者保护、BoZ 市场行为、公开产品页面
policy_impact_rows.source_anchor_en: CCPC consumer protection, BoZ market conduct, public product pages
policy_impact_rows.examples: FLoan, Lupiya, PowerKwacha, PremierCredit, SuperKwacha, Finedge / ka Something
policy_impact_rows.impact_cn: 高 APR、服务费、逾期费或“instant/low interest”文案越强，越需要检查是否清楚说明总成本、期限和还款条件。
policy_impact_rows.impact_en: The stronger APR, service-fee, late-fee, or instant/low-interest claims are, the more important total-cost, tenor, and repayment disclosure becomes.
policy_impact_rows.next_action_cn: 把每个核心 App 的费用、总还款、逾期费、期限和示例还款表拆成可比较字段。
policy_impact_rows.next_action_en: Turn each core app's fee, total repayment, late fee, tenor, and example repayment table into comparable fields.

policy_impact_rows.policy_theme_cn: 数据保护、权限、同意和删除账号
policy_impact_rows.policy_theme_en: Data protection, permissions, consent, and account deletion
policy_impact_rows.source_anchor_cn: Data Protection Commission、公开隐私政策、Google Play Data Safety
policy_impact_rows.source_anchor_en: Data Protection Commission, public privacy policies, Google Play Data Safety
policy_impact_rows.examples: FLoan, PowerKwacha, SuperKwacha, Finedge / ka Something, Phindu Credit, FairMoney Zambia
policy_impact_rows.impact_cn: App-first 贷款通常依赖设备、身份、联系人或位置类数据线索；隐私政策和删除账号入口会直接影响信任、投诉和监管风险。
policy_impact_rows.impact_en: App-first lending often depends on device, identity, contact, or location data clues; privacy and account-deletion routes affect trust, complaints, and regulatory risk.
policy_impact_rows.next_action_cn: 对核心 App 建立隐私政策、Data Safety、账号删除和客服入口的对照表。
policy_impact_rows.next_action_en: Build a side-by-side table for privacy policy, Data Safety, account deletion, and support routes.

policy_impact_rows.policy_theme_cn: 投诉、争议处理和客服 SLA
policy_impact_rows.policy_theme_en: Complaints, dispute handling, and support SLA
policy_impact_rows.source_anchor_cn: ZICTA DFS 投诉入口、CCPC 通知、公开客服页面
policy_impact_rows.source_anchor_en: ZICTA DFS complaint channel, CCPC notices, public support pages
policy_impact_rows.examples: FLoan, PowerKwacha, PremierCredit, SuperKwacha, Finedge / ka Something, Phindu Credit
policy_impact_rows.impact_cn: 放款失败、还款未入账、欺诈和客服不响应会从运营问题升级成投诉和声誉风险。
policy_impact_rows.impact_en: Failed disbursement, unposted repayment, fraud, and weak support can move from operations issues into complaint and reputation risk.
policy_impact_rows.next_action_cn: 对每个竞品记录公开客服入口、投诉路径、退款/失败交易说明和是否有人工升级机制。
policy_impact_rows.next_action_en: Track public support routes, complaint paths, refund/failed-transaction wording, and manual escalation options for each competitor.

policy_impact_rows.policy_theme_cn: 支付轨道、放款/还款失败和对账
policy_impact_rows.policy_theme_en: Payment rails, disbursement/repayment failures, and reconciliation
policy_impact_rows.source_anchor_cn: BoZ 支付系统、电子货币、移动支付和转账公开文件
policy_impact_rows.source_anchor_en: BoZ payment-system, e-money, mobile-payment, and money-transfer public documents
policy_impact_rows.examples: FLoan, PowerKwacha, PremierCredit, SuperKwacha, Finedge / ka Something, Phindu Credit
policy_impact_rows.impact_cn: 依赖 mobile money、银行转账或 USSD 的产品，需要重点观察失败交易、到账时效、退款、人工对账和客服脚本。
policy_impact_rows.impact_en: Products relying on mobile money, bank transfer, or USSD need attention on failed transactions, payout timing, refunds, manual reconciliation, and support scripts.
policy_impact_rows.next_action_cn: 把所有放款/还款通道字段统一到矩阵，并把失败交易处理作为单独字段。
policy_impact_rows.next_action_en: Normalize all disbursement/repayment channels into the matrix and add a separate failed-transaction handling field.

policy_impact_rows.policy_theme_cn: 公司、财报和社会影响变化
policy_impact_rows.source_anchor_cn: 官网公告、年报、集团披露、LinkedIn、行业研究
policy_impact_rows.source_anchor_en: Official news, annual reports, group disclosures, LinkedIn, and industry studies
policy_impact_rows.examples: Lupiya, SmartFin, Agora Microfinance, Bayport Zambia, FINCA Zambia, VisionFund Zambia
policy_impact_rows.impact_cn: 融资、招聘、合作伙伴、亏损/盈利、社会影响披露会影响竞品扩张速度、风控偏好和渠道策略。
policy_impact_rows.impact_en: Funding, hiring, partnerships, profit/loss, and social-impact disclosures affect expansion speed, risk appetite, and channel strategy.
policy_impact_rows.next_action_cn: 为相邻微贷和集团型玩家建立公司层事件流，而不是只看产品页。
policy_impact_rows.next_action_en: Create a company-level event stream for adjacent MFIs and group-backed players instead of reading only product pages.

competitor_event_rows.event_cn: 公开 Google Play listing 可作为额度、期限、APR、Data Safety 和更新时间的候选监控入口。
competitor_event_rows.event_en: Public Google Play listing can be used as a candidate source for limit, tenor, APR, Data Safety, and update timing.
competitor_event_rows.business_read_cn: 这类 App-first 产品最容易把费用披露、隐私权限和公开评论主题连接起来，应进入核心候选池。
competitor_event_rows.business_read_en: This app-first product connects fee disclosure, privacy permissions, and public-review themes, so it belongs in the core candidate pool.

competitor_event_rows.event_cn: 官网显示 app、web、USSD 数字贷款和 mobile money/bank repayment 线索。
competitor_event_rows.event_en: Website shows app, web, USSD digital-loan clues and mobile-money/bank repayment language.
competitor_event_rows.business_read_cn: USSD 和多通道入口会影响获客、身份核验、客服和失败交易处理方式。
competitor_event_rows.business_read_en: USSD and multichannel entry affect acquisition, identity checks, support, and failed-transaction handling.

competitor_event_rows.event_cn: 官网公开个人贷款和 salary loan 定位。
competitor_event_rows.event_en: Website presents personal-loan and salary-loan positioning.
competitor_event_rows.business_read_cn: 工资客群通常会改变授信资料、还款节奏和催收脚本，应与纯 App 小额现金贷分开比较。
competitor_event_rows.business_read_en: Salary segments usually change documentation, repayment rhythm, and collections scripting, so they should be compared separately from pure app cash loans.

competitor_event_rows.event_cn: 公开公司页面可用于观察招聘、合作伙伴和产品定位，但默认只做人工回源候选。
competitor_event_rows.event_en: Public company pages can show hiring, partnerships, and positioning, but remain manual-review candidates by default.
competitor_event_rows.business_read_cn: 公司层动态能补足官网产品页看不到的扩张和渠道信号。
competitor_event_rows.business_read_en: Company-level updates can reveal expansion and channel signals that product pages miss.

competitor_event_rows.event_cn: 公开监管和消费者保护信号应映射到竞品费用披露、投诉、隐私和支付失败处理字段。
competitor_event_rows.event_en: Public regulatory and consumer-protection signals should be mapped to competitor fee disclosure, complaints, privacy, and failed-payment handling fields.
competitor_event_rows.business_read_cn: 政策不只是一份文件；它会决定哪些竞品字段必须持续观察。
competitor_event_rows.business_read_en: Policy is not just a document; it decides which competitor fields need continuous monitoring.

competitor_event_rows.event_cn: Google Play 等公开 listing 可用于主题聚合，但不默认保存用户名、个人身份或原始敏感叙述。
competitor_event_rows.event_en: Google Play and similar public listings can be used for theme aggregation, without storing usernames, identity data, or sensitive raw narratives by default.
competitor_event_rows.business_read_cn: 公开评论的价值在于主题趋势，而不是个人故事采集。
competitor_event_rows.business_read_en: The value of public reviews is theme trend analysis, not collection of individual stories.

research_notes.title: Phase-1 competitor watch review
research_notes.note: 历史备注存在编码损坏，需回源复核。
research_notes.market_question: Which competitor product, payment, support, and privacy signals matter most for Zambia micro-lending ops?

research_notes.title: Payment rails affect lending ops before they look like lending rules
research_notes.note: The strongest BoZ signals for a lending operator are not only loan-specific. ZIPSS/Montran/NFS changes can affect disbursement and repayment reliability; e-money/mobile-payment/money-transfer directives shape partner and channel expectations; complaints and fee directives shape the customer harm surface.

research_notes.title: BoZ payment rails line is metadata-first, then manual-read
research_notes.note: The BoZ website now works better through its public JSON:API regulatory document metadata than through legacy HTML/PDF root URLs. For this capability line, use JSON:API signals for monitoring and treat several PDF directives as manual-read/OCR sources when pypdf cannot extract text.

research_notes.title: DPC source creates a privacy capability line for lending research
research_notes.note: The useful DPC signals cluster around data-subject rights, public education, compliance oversight, enforcement, cross-border cooperation, and controller/processor registration. These are directly relevant to public loan-app review because digital lending depends on KYC, phone data, app permissions, repayment communications, and third-party vendors.
research_notes.market_question: What privacy and data-subject rights themes should a lending app operator understand from public sources?

research_notes.title: DPC source requires SSL fallback but produces useful privacy signals
research_notes.note: Scrapling fails on local issuer-chain validation for DPC, but the configured public-source SSL fallback retrieved useful data. This should remain source-scoped and documented, not a global default.
research_notes.market_question: Which public sources are stable enough for recurring Scrapling collection, and which need fallback/manual review?

research_notes.title: CCPC signals split into conduct principles vs noise
research_notes.note: The useful CCPC items are not loan-app-specific, but they form a conduct lens: accurate information, clear pricing, material disclosure, avoiding misleading claims, and enabling consumers to report concerns. Goods seizure headlines, navigation text, hashtags, and duplicated homepage fragments should be rejected.
research_notes.market_question: Which CCPC public signals transfer cleanly into digital lending operations research?

research_notes.title: Disclosure and pricing are the strongest CCPC-to-lending bridge
research_notes.note: Signals 23-25 are the strongest bridge from general consumer protection to lending ops because lending products rely heavily on terms, pricing, limitations, eligibility, repayment obligations, and customer understanding.
research_notes.market_question: Which disclosure failures would create the highest risk for a public loan-app review?

research_notes.title: CCPC selector noise
research_notes.note: The CCPC source is technically reachable through Scrapling, but broad selectors capture footer/copyright text. This is a source-quality issue, not a market signal.
research_notes.market_question: Which selectors produce useful consumer-protection signals without boilerplate noise?

research_notes.title: Personal research mode reset
research_notes.note: The project is now framed as a private public-source market research platform for capability-building, not a commercial pilot.
research_notes.market_question: Which public signals best explain Zambia digital lending market risk without using private knowledge?

market_questions.question: Which public complaint themes appear most often around digital financial services and lending-adjacent journeys?
market_questions.current_hypothesis: For public-source lending research, the strongest CCPC-derived complaint themes are unclear material information, pricing/term disclosure, misleading representations, and consumer ability to report concerns.
market_questions.evidence: Reviewed signals 23, 24, 25, and 26 from CCPC public-source scrape; rejected non-lending goods seizure and navigation noise.

market_questions.question: How do BoZ payment-system rules, payment-rail changes, and mobile-money/payment-service directives affect digital lending disbursement, repayment, failed transactions, complaints, fees, and partner risk?
market_questions.current_hypothesis: BoZ payment-rails signals matter to lending ops through three practical channels: payment availability/settlement windows, partner due diligence for payment-service providers, and customer-facing complaint/fee/dispute controls.
market_questions.evidence: Reviewed BoZ signals include Montran Gateway/ZIPSS circulars, National Financial Switch items, Cyber and Information Risk Management Guidelines, payment-service partner due diligence, unwarranted charges directives, e-money/mobile-payments/money-transfer/complaints directives as manual-read sources.

market_questions.question: What privacy and data-subject rights themes should a lending app operator understand from public sources?
market_questions.current_hypothesis: The most important public privacy themes for lending apps are data-subject rights, consent/permission clarity, controller/processor registration, responsible data handling, enforcement risk, and cross-border transfer awareness for SaaS/vendor stacks.
market_questions.evidence: Reviewed DPC signals 184-190 and 192; Data Protection Act PDF signal 189 should become a manual reading task.

market_questions.question: Which public regulator pages are most useful for tracking lending, payments, consumer protection, and data protection risk?
market_questions.current_hypothesis: CCPC is useful as a broad conduct and consumer-protection source, but it needs manual filtering before it becomes useful for digital lending notes.
market_questions.evidence: CCPC source produced both useful conduct-principle signals and substantial noise; reviewed 9 useful/low-to-high relevance items and rejected 16 noisy or duplicated items.

market_questions.question: Which public sources are stable enough for recurring Scrapling collection, and which should remain manual review sources?
market_questions.current_hypothesis: CCPC is reachable through Scrapling with noise filtering; DPC needs a documented SSL fallback but produces higher-quality privacy signals after manual filtering.
market_questions.evidence: CCPC latest run: 24 signals after exclude_keywords. DPC latest run: 17 signals via source-scoped SSL fallback; 10 reviewed and 7 rejected as navigation/title noise.

market_questions.question: Where do mobile-money fraud, incomplete transaction, and customer-support issues overlap with lending operations?

lanes.name: 监管与支付轨道
lanes.why: 这条线决定贷款产品能不能稳定放款、正确入账、解释费用，并在监管/消费者保护语境下保持可复核。
lanes.next_action: 固定追踪 BoZ 支付系统、CCPC 消费者保护、DPC 数据保护；每条信号都映射到产品页面、支付异常、客服话术或复核清单。

lanes.name: 竞品产品矩阵
lanes.why: 竞品变化最有价值的部分不是“谁存在”，而是额度、期限、费用表达、速度承诺、支付方式、客服/隐私入口如何组合成产品打法。
lanes.next_action: 把已复核竞品信号继续结构化成额度档、期限、速度、支付成熟度、客服/隐私成熟度和公开信息缺口。

lanes.name: 投诉、客服与舆情
lanes.why: 这条线更接近真实用户摩擦：不到账、扣费不清、客服解释不足、欺诈、账号或钱包问题，都会直接影响坏账、投诉和口碑。
lanes.next_action: 增加公开 app listing/review、公开新闻和公开投诉关键词 watchlist；只抓公开页面，不碰登录、私域群组或借款人数据。

lanes.name: 催收与客户沟通
lanes.why: 催收风险通常不会先以政策文件出现，而会从投诉、隐私边界、联系人使用、逾期解释和客服升级里显形。
lanes.next_action: 在投诉/评论来源中强化 overdue、late payment、collection、harassment、contact、privacy 等关键词，并把结果映射到催收话术和升级边界。

lanes.name: 周报解读与部署数据层
lanes.why: 平台的价值不在抓取次数，而在每周能不能产出一份可读、可复核、能指导学习重点的个人研究笔记。
lanes.next_action: 云端展示用 GitHub snapshot 和生成的 Markdown/CSV，本地继续保留 SQLite 作为研究库；节点版本同步后让 Streamlit 自动刷新。

actions.recommended_action: 只把监管信号映射为待复核流程，不把公开页面表述当作法律或合规结论。

actions.name: 竞品产品与 App 层变化
actions.trigger: 14 条相关公开信号；本窗口变化 +14。
actions.recommended_action: 继续维护竞品矩阵；Google Play/app listing 先作为候选源，确认边界后再启用。

actions.name: 费用、定价与披露摩擦
actions.trigger: 14 条相关公开信号；本窗口变化 +14。
actions.recommended_action: 把总成本、费用名称、扣款时点、第三方费用和逾期费用拆开复核，避免客户把支付轨道费用误认为贷款费用。

actions.name: 隐私、权限与账户控制
actions.trigger: 12 条相关公开信号；本窗口变化 +12。
actions.recommended_action: 为每类数据写清收集目的、使用场景、保存期限、共享对象和客户权利入口，尤其关注联系人、设备、位置和交易数据。

actions.name: 放款/支付失败与到账摩擦
actions.trigger: 9 条相关公开信号；本窗口变化 +9。
actions.recommended_action: 建立支付异常分流表：到账慢、扣款失败、重复扣款、还款未入账分别对应证据、SLA、客服话术和升级负责人。

gaps.name: 监管/政策
gaps.gap: 已有 BoZ、CCPC、DPC，但仍偏政策文件，需要转成业务流程影响。
gaps.next_source: 继续 BoZ JSON:API、CCPC、DPC；补 BoZ publications/annual reports 的稳定文件路径。

gaps.name: 竞品
gaps.gap: phase-1 官网/FAQ watchlist 已建立并完成首轮复核，但 Google Play/app listing 和公开评论层仍未默认启用。
gaps.next_source: 把已复核官网信号整理成竞品矩阵；再决定是否启用 Google Play/public app listing，用于观察 app 权限、评分、公开评论主题。

gaps.name: 投诉/客服
gaps.gap: 已有 ZICTA/CCPC/BoZ complaint 信号，但缺少真实公开用户评论和投诉主题趋势。
gaps.next_source: 运行 ZICTA DFS 两个源；补公开 app review、公开新闻和公开社媒页面的低频监控。

gaps.name: 舆情/声誉
gaps.gap: 目前多为官方叙事，不能代表借款人声音或品牌舆情。
gaps.next_source: 增加公开新闻搜索结果、公开 app reviews、公开 Facebook/LinkedIn 页面，仅限无需登录内容。

lanes.name: Regulatory and Payment Rails
lanes.why: This lane determines whether the lending product can disburse reliably, post repayments correctly, explain fees, and remain reviewable under regulatory and consumer-protection expectations.
lanes.next_action: Keep watching BoZ payment systems, CCPC consumer protection, and DPC data protection; map each signal to product screens, payment exceptions, support scripts, or review checklists.

lanes.name: Competitor Product Matrix
lanes.why: The useful part of competitor monitoring is not who exists, but how limits, tenor, pricing language, speed promises, payment methods, support, and privacy routes form product strategy.
lanes.next_action: Keep structuring reviewed competitor signals into limit tier, tenor, speed, payment maturity, support/privacy maturity, and evidence gaps.

lanes.name: Complaints, Support, and Reputation
lanes.why: This lane is closest to real user friction: delayed payout, unclear charges, weak support explanations, fraud, account, or wallet issues directly affect credit loss, complaints, and reputation.
lanes.next_action: Add public app listing/review, public news, and public complaint-keyword watchlists; use only public pages, not logged-in spaces, private groups, or borrower data.

lanes.name: Collections and Customer Communication
lanes.why: Collections risk often appears first through complaints, privacy boundaries, contact-person usage, overdue explanations, and support escalation rather than formal policy documents.
lanes.next_action: Strengthen overdue, late payment, collection, harassment, contact, and privacy keywords in complaint/review sources, then map results to collections scripts and escalation boundaries.

lanes.name: Brief Interpretation and Deployment Data Layer
lanes.why: The platform's value is not crawl volume. It is whether each week produces a readable, source-linked note that guides learning priorities.
lanes.next_action: Use GitHub snapshots and generated Markdown/CSV for cloud display while keeping SQLite as the local research store; milestone sync should trigger Streamlit refresh.

actions.name: Regulatory, Consumer Protection, and Operating Constraints
actions.recommended_action: Map regulatory signals into process checks only; do not treat public-page wording as legal or compliance conclusions.

actions.name: Competitor Product and App-Layer Change
actions.recommended_action: Keep maintaining the competitor matrix; keep Google Play/app listings as candidate sources until source boundaries are confirmed.

actions.name: Fees, Pricing, and Disclosure Friction
actions.recommended_action: Review total cost, fee labels, deduction timing, third-party fees, and late fees separately so rail fees are not mistaken for loan fees.

actions.name: Privacy, Permissions, and Account Control
actions.recommended_action: Document purpose, use case, retention, sharing party, and rights channel for each data type, especially contacts, device, location, and transaction data.

actions.name: Disbursement and Payment-Failure Friction
actions.recommended_action: Build a payment-exception routing table for delayed payout, failed deduction, duplicate deduction, and unposted repayment, with evidence, SLA, support script, and owner.

gaps.name: Regulatory and Policy
gaps.gap: BoZ, CCPC, and DPC exist, but many signals are policy documents and need process-level interpretation.
gaps.next_source: Continue BoZ JSON:API, CCPC, DPC; add stable BoZ publications/annual-report file routes.

gaps.name: Competitors
gaps.gap: The phase-1 website/FAQ watchlist exists and has first-pass review, but Google Play/app listings and public-review sources remain disabled by default.
gaps.next_source: Turn reviewed website signals into a competitor matrix; then decide whether to enable Google Play/public app listings for app permissions, ratings, and public-review themes.

gaps.name: Complaints and Support
gaps.gap: ZICTA/CCPC/BoZ complaint signals exist, but real public user-review and complaint-theme trend sources are missing.
gaps.next_source: Run both ZICTA DFS sources; add low-frequency public app review, public news, and public social-page monitoring.

gaps.name: Sentiment and Reputation
gaps.gap: Current signals are mostly official narratives and do not represent borrower voice or brand sentiment.
gaps.next_source: Add public news results, public app reviews, and public Facebook/LinkedIn pages, only where no login is required.
